name: M:GTA.World.CreateParticleEffectNonLooped(GTA.ParticleEffectAsset,System.String,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single,GTA.InvertAxisFlags)
summary: Starts a Particle Effect that runs once at a given position then is destroyed.

params.name: pos
params.description: The World position where the effect is.

params.name: rot
params.description: What rotation to apply to the effect.

params.name: scale
params.description: How much to scale the size of the effect by.

params.name: invertAxis
params.description: Which axis to flip the effect in.
